sentences.arabic: الرَّاوِي شَخْصٌ يَحْكِي الْقِصَصَ لِلنَّاسِ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ وَالسَّاحَاتِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pripovijedač je osoba koja priča priče ljudima na ulicama i javnim trgovima.
sentences.translationEn: The storyteller is a person who tells stories to people in the streets and public squares.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الرَّاوِي قَدِيمًا أَهَمَّ مَصْدَرٍ لِلتَّسْلِيَةِ وَنَقْلِ الْأَخْبَارِ.
sentences.translation: Nekada je pripovijedač bio najvažniji izvor zabave i prenošenja vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: In the past the storyteller was the most important source of entertainment and news.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ النَّاسُ حَوْلَهُ وَيُصْغُونَ إِلَيْهِ بِانْتِبَاهٍ شَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi sjede oko njega i slušaju ga s velikom pažnjom.
sentences.translationEn: People sit around him and listen with great attention.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَزَالُ بَعْضُ الرُّوَاةِ يَعْمَلُونَ فِي أَسْوَاقِ مَرَّاكُشَ وَغَيْرِهَا مِنَ الْمُدُنِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ الْعَرِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neki pripovijedači još uvijek rade na tržnicama Marakeša i drugih drevnih arapskih gradova.
sentences.translationEn: Some storytellers still work in the markets of Marrakesh and other ancient Arab cities.
